arts.ttl: From France: ‘Insults, punches, flying stools’ as PSG and Aston Villa fans clash outside Moulin Rouge
arts.sum: On Tuesday, we covered reports from France which stated Paris authorities were well prepared to welcome Aston Villa supporters, and were well aware there would be a large number travelling to the city without tickets. It was also explained that the match wasn’t seen as especially troublesome to police because there’s no record of animosity The post From France: ‘Insults, punches, flying stools’ as PSG and Aston Villa fans clash outside Moulin Rouge appeared first on Sport Witness.
